<<code language="ocaml" | sig
  type t
  type y = [ `Almost_email | `Almost_phone | `Email | `Invalid | `Phone ]
  val y : Lib.Email_or_phone.Almost.t -> Lib.Email_or_phone.Almost.y
  val to_string : Lib.Email_or_phone.Almost.t -> string
  val of_string : only_mail:bool -> string -> Lib.Email_or_phone.Almost.t
end >>
